title: hieracium sagittatum subsp. scalenum
intro: Hieracium sagittatum subsp. scalenum, also known as the lesser hawk's-beard or scalene hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is also known to have health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues. Hieracium sagittatum subsp. scalenum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
